text:
Once upon an autumn afternoon. There was a little girl named Ruby. She lived in a sunny town named Dalesworth.

One day Ruby decided to collect berries with her favourite fluffy squirrel visitor, Poppy. They snuck into cherry trees and blueberry bushes.

After collecting what seemed like an endless supply, they sat beneath an elderberry tree. Ruby watched Poppy pile her berries neatly.

Suddenly, they heard a strange rumbling. An enormous owl swooped down beside them.

Ruby jumped!

Poppy shrieked!

But the big owl just hooted happily. Then something unexpected happened.

Ruby threw berries at the owl. But instead of flying away, the talons just clucked happily!

They laughed together. Well, Poppy did. Ruby was shy.

Suddenly Poppy glowed!

Ruby gasped. She had collected Moonlight Blossoms! They weren’t just any berries—they glowed!

They put on a show for an imaginary audience.

That night, every star seemed
